scope: HarmonyOS app plus Reader-Core public package and evidence contracts
topline: Reader-Core compatibility semantics are no longer the largest active gap. The largest remaining gaps are HarmonyOS productization plus the current fail-closed external nativeHTTP/corpus device CI result.

latestDeviceRuntimeCI.currentFailure: external nativeHTTP FAIL 0 and Corpus FAIL with network_error/corpus_error after app-level proxy application reported app:on; device-local LocalHTTP reports PASS 2xx, LocalFeed reports PASS rss:1, DataStore reports PASS v75:3, LocalBook reports PASS epub:1, ReaderShell reports PASS fixture in the home layout, SourceMgmt reports PASS fixture in the settings layout, and Headless reports PASS fixture with Download PASS 2/2, TTS PASS q:3, WebDAV PASS sync, FileToken PASS opaque, and DBMig PASS v75:32; hostNetworkProbe observed directHttps=tls_error proxyHttps=tls_error proxyHttp=http_5xx

requiredTokens: Later on 2026-06-23 HarmonyOS emulator targets became available

scopeExclusions: UI/page behavior parity from the local non-UI bundle and headless demo
production HarmonyOS signing and release distribution
full Legado reader shell, source management UI, RSS UI, TTS playback UI/media session, download UI/background worker, and WebDAV UI/production client

rows.currentEvidence: Core rule models, CSS/XPath/JSONPath/template URL chain semantics, source import contracts, metadata, expected, and matrix evidence are present in the current Reader-Core worktree.
rows.legadoGap: Remaining confidence gap is broad authorized real-source regression and unknown long-tail rules, not the base source-rule model.
rows.nextProofRequired: Run broader authorized real-source replay and bind any new parser edge to metadata, expected, matrix, and regression.

rows.owner: Reader-Core contracts plus HarmonyOS platform adapter
rows.currentEvidence: Core imports platform-runtime evidence; HarmonyOS runtime panel reached LocalHTTP, LocalFeed, DataStore, LocalBook, ArkWeb, Cookie, Session, JS, and Secure PASS in the latest CI artifact, but external nativeHTTP and Corpus are still FAIL; hostNetworkProbe is recorded as classes only and does not export raw URL/body/cookie/session data.
rows.legadoGap: Not Legado-grade dynamic source coverage: default parser-chain JS enable policy, long-tail host bindings, broad live-source coverage, login UX, and current external nativeHTTP/corpus PASS are still missing.
rows.nextProofRequired: Fix current external nativeHTTP/corpus CI failure and then add redacted login/cookie/session source-chain evidence.

rows.currentEvidence: Reader-Core root gate application evidence records production_release pass and closed blockers; HarmonyOS consumes that evidence and does not mutate Core root artifacts.
rows.legadoGap: Release gate pass is a governance state, not proof that the full Legado Android product surface exists on HarmonyOS.
rows.nextProofRequired: Keep Core root gate application evidence separate from HarmonyOS product runtime, signing, and release evidence.

rows.currentEvidence: npm run ci:device-runtime builds, installs, starts EntryAbility, polls pidof and the home panel until the app is reachable, starts device-local HTTP/RSS/local-book fixtures, captures JSON/JUnit/layout/screenshot artifacts, injects proxy-aware launch config, applies app-level proxy, records hostNetworkProbe classes, and validates fail-closed offline. Latest run proves LocalHTTP PASS 2xx, LocalFeed PASS rss:1, DataStore PASS v75:3, LocalBook PASS epub:1, ReaderShell PASS fixture in the home layout, SourceMgmt PASS fixture in the settings layout, and Headless PASS fixture with Download PASS 2/2, TTS PASS q:3, WebDAV PASS sync, FileToken PASS opaque, and DBMig PASS v75:32, but still fails external nativeHTTP/corpus.
rows.legadoGap: The former one-off smoke gap is reduced to a repeatable CI gate. LocalHTTP proves adapter-level device-to-host 2xx, LocalFeed proves device-local RSS fetch plus parse on the emulator, DataStore proves preferences-backed schema/migration/record smoke, LocalBook proves a device-visible EPUB fixture plus opaque permission handoff smoke, ReaderShell proves a fixture-bound reader preview home layout, SourceMgmt proves a fixture-bound source management/debug summary, and Headless proves fixture-bound download/TTS/WebDAV/file-token/DB migration service seams. Runtime parity cannot be claimed until the latest gate reports PASS for external nativeHTTP and corpus while preserving all local, headless, ArkWeb, cookie/session, JS, and secure-storage evidence.
rows.nextProofRequired: Produce a latest CI artifact with external nativeHTTP and Corpus PASS, preserving LocalHTTP PASS 2xx, LocalFeed PASS rss:1, DataStore PASS v75:3, LocalBook PASS epub:1, ReaderShell PASS fixture, SourceMgmt PASS fixture, Headless PASS fixture, and matching layout tokens without raw value export.

rows.currentEvidence: TXT, EPUB, PDF, MOBI/AZW3, UMD, HTML, and unknown format detection boundaries are measured in the clean-room non-UI bundle. Latest HarmonyOS device-runtime CI artifact also records LocalBook PASS epub:1 and deviceLocalBookProbe configured/format=epub/tocCount=1/bookshelfCount=1/permissionHandoff=true/passedInRuntimePanel=true from a device-visible EPUB fixture, plus deviceHeadlessServiceDemo FileToken PASS opaque for raw-path redaction and unsupported-format mapping.
rows.legadoGap: Legado has complete file import flows and reader UI depth; HarmonyOS still needs real-file corpus coverage, file-picker permission-token UX, rendering depth, and reader integration. The LocalBook/FileToken smoke is not real-file corpus parity and is not reader UI parity.
rows.nextProofRequired: Run authorized real-file corpus import on device, bind file-picker permission-token UX, and prove reader rendering/navigation integration without raw local path export while preserving FileToken PASS opaque.

rows.owner: Reader-Core parser/runtime plus HarmonyOS host UI
rows.currentEvidence: Clean-room RSS/Atom/JSON Feed fixture parser evidence exists; latest HarmonyOS device-runtime CI artifact fetches a device-local RSS fixture through nativeHTTP and the runtime panel reports LocalFeed PASS rss:1 with deviceLocalFeedProbe metadata redacted.
rows.legadoGap: Need external live feed execution, subscription management UI, cookie/login feed handling, JS-rendered feed handling, and background refresh.
rows.nextProofRequired: Add authorized external live feed smoke plus feed subscription UI evidence and background refresh contract evidence.

rows.currentEvidence: The non-UI bundle records 21 Legado-like entity names, DAO contract names, migration-step boundaries, and redacted durable-record evidence. Latest HarmonyOS device-runtime CI artifact records DataStore PASS v75:3 and deviceDataStoreProbe configured/schemaVersion=75/migrationStepCount=32/recordCount=3/passedInRuntimePanel=true from a preferences-backed write/reopen smoke, and deviceHeadlessServiceDemo records DBMig PASS v75:32 for the full v43->v75 migration boundary demo.
rows.legadoGap: Legado has a production Room database and DAOs; HarmonyOS still needs a production persistence store, full migrations applied to the production store, query/transaction behavior, and failure recovery. The DataStore/DBMig smoke is device/headless persistence evidence, not Room parity.
rows.nextProofRequired: Implement and validate the HarmonyOS production datastore/migration layer without claiming Core ownership of platform DB; preserve DataStore PASS v75:3 and DBMig PASS v75:32 as smoke prerequisites.

rows.currentEvidence: HarmonyOS has app shell, local bookshelf/search/settings smoke, a local service-bound home dashboard, latest device-runtime CI home layout contains ReaderShell PASS fixture plus deviceReaderUISmoke configured/mode=fixture/tocCount=12/passedInHomeLayout=true, and latest settings layout contains SourceMgmt PASS fixture plus deviceSourceManagementSmoke configured/mode=fixture/sourceCount=3/enabledCount=2/debugPassed=true/redacted=true/passedInSettingsLayout=true.
rows.legadoGap: Legado includes full reader shell depth, live source debugger, RSS UI, download UI, TTS playback UI, WebDAV UI, local web/server, settings depth, and background services. The ReaderShell fixture preview is not full reader rendering/navigation parity, SourceMgmt fixture evidence is not live source debugger parity, and the headless demo does not close product UI parity.
rows.nextProofRequired: Promote reader preview to full reader rendering/navigation proof, promote SourceMgmt fixture to a live source debugger workflow, then build product RSS, download UI, TTS playback UI, and WebDAV UI workflows on top of the existing device headless demo evidence.

rows.owner: HarmonyOS host services plus platform adapters
rows.currentEvidence: The non-UI bundle measures WebDAV backup/restore envelope behavior, download/cache scheduling, and TTS/HTTP TTS queue and credential-redaction boundaries. Latest device-runtime CI now records deviceHeadlessServiceDemo configured=true mode=fixture passedInRuntimePanel=true with Download PASS 2/2, TTS PASS q:3, WebDAV PASS sync, FileToken PASS opaque, DBMig PASS v75:32, and redacted=true.
rows.legadoGap: Need production WebDAV client/server execution, backup/restore UX, background download jobs, native/HTTP TTS playback, notifications, and media-session integration. The device headless demo is a temporary fixture closure, not production service parity.
rows.nextProofRequired: Replace the fixture demo with production WebDAV HTTP, background download worker evidence, native/HTTP TTS playback and media-session proof, while keeping redacted credentials and deviceHeadlessServiceDemo regression tokens.
